homepage.heroSubline: Precision welding for homes and businesses across Metro Detroit. Built to withstand Michigan's toughest conditions.
aboutText: Summit Welding was founded in 2012 by a team of Detroit natives who saw the need for durable, weather-resistant metalwork in our region. What started as a two-man operation in Corktown has grown into a full-service welding company serving all of Southeast Michigan.

We approach every project with Midwest work ethic and engineering precision. Our welders are certified professionals who understand how Michigan's freeze-thaw cycles and road salt demand superior craftsmanship.
From repairing historic ironwork in Indian Village to fabricating custom garage doors for Rochester Hills homeowners, we're proud to strengthen Detroit's infrastructure one weld at a time.

valueProps.title: Michigan-Tested
valueProps.description: Our welds withstand lake-effect snow, road salt corrosion, and temperature swings from -10°F to 95°F.

valueProps.title: Historic Expertise
valueProps.description: We specialize in preserving the character of Detroit's 1920s-40s homes while upgrading structural integrity.

valueProps.title: Same-Day Estimates
valueProps.description: Get a precise quote within 24 hours - no vague ballpark figures that leave you guessing.

valueProps.title: Local Materials
valueProps.description: We source American-made steel from Great Lakes suppliers for better durability and faster turnaround.

homepage.ctaSubline: Call 555-WEL-RQ14 today for welding that stands up to Detroit winters.

services.name: Foundation Repair Welding
services.shortDescription: Structural welding solutions for Michigan's shifting foundations.
services.description:
Detroit's freeze-thaw cycles wreak havoc on home foundations. We reinforce compromised structural steel with precision welding techniques developed for our climate.

Our process begins with ultrasonic testing to identify hairline cracks in basement I-beams and support columns. For brick Colonials common in Palmer Woods, we install custom steel lintels that distribute weight without altering historic facades. In Rochester Hills' newer developments, we address settling issues with sub-grade steel reinforcement before concrete pouring.

All welds receive anti-corrosion treatment to resist road salt infiltration - a critical step most general contractors overlook. We warranty our foundation work for 10 years because we know Michigan weather doesn't give second chances.
process: Step 1: Laser-level assessment of foundation shifts
Step 2: Ultrasonic crack detection in structural steel
Step 3: Custom fabrication of reinforcement plates
Step 4: Salt-resistant epoxy coating on all welds
benefits: Prevents costly structural damage from Michigan winters

faq.question: How do I know if my foundation needs welding repair?
faq.answer: Look for doors that stick, diagonal cracks in basement walls, or visible rust on steel supports. We provide free laser assessments to confirm.

faq.question: Will welding disturb my finished basement?
faq.answer: We use localized heat control methods that minimize disruption. Most jobs require only small access panels rather than full demolition.

services.name: Historic Ironwork Restoration
services.shortDescription: Preserving Detroit's architectural metalwork with period-accurate techniques.
services.description:
From Corktown's wrought-iron fences to Midtown's Art Deco railings, we specialize in restoring Detroit's vanishing metal craftsmanship. Our team combines traditional blacksmithing methods with modern metallurgy for repairs that look original but perform better.

For Indian Village's ornate balcony railings, we recreate missing elements using century-old forge patterns found in the Detroit Historical Society archives. All repairs begin with soda blasting to remove decades of road salt corrosion without damaging delicate scrollwork. We then use low-heat TIG welding to maintain the steel's original temper.

Finished pieces receive our signature 3-stage protective coating: zinc-rich primer, industrial enamel, and carnauba wax sealant. This system has protected restored ironwork at the Detroit Institute of Arts for over a decade.

faq.question: Can you match my home's original 1920s ironwork?
faq.answer: We maintain a library of 300+ historic Detroit patterns. If we don't have your design, we'll create custom tooling at no extra cost.

faq.question: How long does restoration last compared to replacement?
faq.answer: Properly restored ironwork typically outlasts new installations by 15-20 years in our climate due to superior original steel quality.

services.name: Garage Door Frame Repair
services.shortDescription: Fixing salt-damaged garage frames before they collapse.
services.description:
Michigan's road salt eats garage door frames from the inside out. We've developed a proprietary repair system that stops corrosion and reinforces structural integrity without full frame replacement.

For Troy's mid-century ranch homes, we cut out compromised steel channels and weld in galvanized replacement sections with overlapping seams to prevent moisture intrusion. The process takes just 6-8 hours compared to 3+ days for complete teardowns. In Royal Oak's brick bungalows, we often discover original frames welded directly to structural masonry - our masons work alongside welders to preserve these historic connections.

Every repair includes our zinc-aluminum spray treatment inside the frame cavity, creating a barrier that outperforms typical paint by 400% in salt spray tests. We guarantee our repairs for 7 years - long enough to survive multiple Detroit winters.
process: Step 1: Magnetic thickness testing for hidden corrosion
Step 2: Precision cutting of damaged sections

faq.question: How urgent is my garage frame repair?
faq.answer: If you see rust flakes or the door sticks in cold weather, address it before next winter. Collapses typically occur after 3-5 years of unchecked corrosion.

faq.question: Will this affect my garage door operation?
faq.answer: Our repairs actually improve operation by restoring original tolerances. We'll adjust your door's spring tension as part of the service.

services.name: Commercial Security Grilles
services.description:
We fabricate commercial security grilles that withstand both forced entry attempts and Michigan's corrosive winters. Unlike off-the-shelf products, our grilles are custom-engineered for each building's vulnerabilities.

For Midtown storefronts, we use 1/2" steel bars with internal rebar cores - a design that stopped a 2019 smash-and-grab attempt cold. All welds are ground smooth to eliminate climbing footholds. Downtown clients get our tamper-proof hinge system with concealed weld points that defeated angle grinder attacks in field tests.

We go beyond basic security by incorporating weather protection. Grilles receive electrostatic powder coating followed by automotive-grade clear coat to resist salt damage. Our sliding track systems include heated elements to prevent winter freeze-ups - a feature developed specifically for Detroit's climate.

faq.question: How do your grilles compare to national brands?
faq.answer: We build 30% heavier than typical retail grilles using thicker gauge steel. Our local fabrication means no weak points from shipping damage.

faq.question: Can grilles match my building's architecture?
faq.answer: Absolutely. We've created Art Deco patterns for Midtown businesses and industrial-chic designs for Corktown restaurants.

services.name: Deck Structural Welding
services.shortDescription: Overbuilt decks for Michigan's extreme weather swings.
services.description:
Most deck failures in our area stem from inadequate connections between wood and metal components. We solve this with structural welding techniques that create seamless load transfer systems.

For Ann Arbor's university-area homes, we weld continuous steel ledger boards that eliminate the fastener failures common in freeze-thaw cycles. All posts receive galvanized steel collars welded to footings - a method that prevented 100% of uplift damage in last year's 75mph windstorm. Our signature innovation is the thermally broken connection, which prevents cold bridging that leads to premature wood rot.

We only use hot-dipped galvanized steel sourced from Cleveland's last remaining mill. This material withstands decades of snow load and summer humidity where powder-coated big-box store hardware fails in 5-7 years. Every weld receives our 3-step marine-grade corrosion treatment.

faq.question: Can you retrofit welding to my existing deck?
faq.answer: Yes, we typically reinforce existing structures by welding steel plates to critical joints without full teardown.

faq.question: How does welding compare to hidden fastener systems?
faq.answer: Welded connections are 5x stronger in sheer tests and don't loosen over time like mechanical fasteners.

services.name: Snow Plow Repair Welding
services.shortDescription: Emergency repairs for Michigan's hardest-working plows.
services.description:
When municipal and commercial plows break down during Detroit snowstorms, we're the team that gets them back on the road. Our mobile welding trucks carry specialized equipment for on-site blade and frame repairs.

We've developed proprietary techniques for common Michigan failures: diamond-pattern reinforcement welding for cracked blades, chromium carbide overlay for cutting edges, and stress-relieving welds for fatigued A-frames. Our most requested service is hydraulic mount repair - we pre-heat components to -20°F before welding to prevent cold cracking in service.

For Troy's DPW fleet, we created a scheduled maintenance program that extends plow lifespan by 3-5 years through strategic reinforcement welding before failure occurs. All repairs use high-nickel electrodes that maintain flexibility in subzero temperatures where standard rods become brittle.

faq.question: How fast can you respond during a snow emergency?
faq.answer: Our 3 mobile crews typically reach any Metro Detroit location within 90 minutes during active storms.

faq.question: Can you weld aluminum plows?
faq.answer: Yes, we carry both MIG and TIG setups for aluminum repairs with proper pre-heat protocols.

services.name: Custom Metal Fabrication
services.shortDescription: Bespoke metalwork for Detroit homes and businesses.
services.description:
From Belle Isle Park pavilion renovations to Midtown loft staircases, we bring architectural metal visions to life with precision fabrication. Our shop combines CNC plasma cutting with old-world craftsmanship.

Recent projects include: replica 1930s balcony railings for an Indian Village restoration, Corten steel planters for a Corktown streetscape, and a floating steel staircase in a Palmer Woods mansion. We specialize in weathering steel that develops a protective patina - ideal for Detroit's variable climate without requiring constant repainting.

Every project begins with 3D modeling to verify structural integrity and aesthetic proportions. For historic districts, we match original tooling marks using traditional hammer-forming techniques. Modern designs benefit from our 5-axis waterjet cutting that creates impossible angles no other Detroit shop can achieve.

faq.question: What metals work best in Detroit's climate?
faq.answer: We recommend weathering steel for most applications - it develops a rust-like appearance that actually protects against further corrosion.

faq.question: Can you recreate my home's original metal features?
faq.answer: Yes, we've documented over 1,200 historic Detroit metalwork patterns and maintain a collection of period-specific tooling.

reviews.name: Marcus T.
reviews.text: Summit restored the 1928 wrought iron fence around our Indian Village home perfectly. They matched the missing finial using old photos and the repaired sections look original. Two winters later with no rust despite heavy salt exposure.

reviews.name: Elena K.
reviews.text: Our Royal Oak garage door was sagging badly last winter. Summit cut out the corroded sections and welded in new steel in one day. The zinc treatment they applied inside the frame stopped all further rust - most contractors just paint over the problem.

reviews.name: Devon S.
reviews.text: After two break-ins at our Corktown bar, Summit installed custom grilles that blend with our historic facade while providing serious protection. Their heated tracks have kept everything operating smoothly through two Detroit winters.

reviews.name: Naomi P.
reviews.text: Our Ann Arbor deck used to shift 2 inches every winter. Summit welded steel connectors throughout the substructure - now it's rock solid even after the heavy 2024 snows. Worth every penny for the peace of mind.

reviews.name: Andre W.
reviews.text: When our fleet plow cracked during the Christmas Eve storm, Summit had a mobile unit onsite in 45 minutes. Their emergency weld held up through the rest of the season. Now we use them for all preventive maintenance too.

reviews.name: Lena R.
reviews.text: The steel beam in our Palmer Woods basement had serious corrosion from years of salt infiltration. Summit reinforced it with custom plates that maintained the historic integrity while adding modern strength. No more winter shifting!

service-areas.title: Welding Service Areas | Summit Welding
service-areas.description: Serving Detroit, Ann Arbor, Troy, Royal Oak, and Rochester Hills with specialized welding services for local conditions.

serviceAreas.content:
Summit Welding proudly serves the Ann Arbor community, providing expert welding services for residential, commercial, and industrial projects. Known for its diverse housing styles, including historic homes and modern builds, our team is skilled in custom metalwork, structural welding, and repair services. Whether you're a University of Michigan property manager or a homeowner in need of durable railings or gates, we deliver precision and quality.

With cold, snowy winters and lake-effect snow, Ann Arbor's climate demands sturdy, weather-resistant metalwork. Our welders specialize in solutions that withstand harsh conditions, from snowplow repairs to reinforcing outdoor structures. Trust Summit Welding for reliable service tailored to Ann Arbor's unique architectural and seasonal needs.
serviceAreas.localContext: A university town with a mix of historic and contemporary homes, Ann Arbor experiences cold winters with significant lake-effect snow.

serviceAreas.content:
Summit Welding is your trusted welding partner in Troy, MI, serving homeowners and businesses with top-tier metal fabrication and repair. Many properties in Troy feature 1960s-70s suburban ranch and Colonial-style homes, often requiring custom railings, fences, or gate repairs. Our team excels in restoring and enhancing these classic designs with durable, aesthetically pleasing welds.

Troy's cold winters and lake-effect snow call for robust outdoor metalwork. We specialize in reinforcing decks, stairs, and other structures to endure heavy snowfall and ice.
